base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fruit_bonus_key — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1980 pac man. Key bonus — 5000 points. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Key bonus — 5000 points; levels 14+; remains for rest of game until famed 'kill screen' at level 256
